perks.name: Scrap Stash
perks.description: Start each run with +10 extra scrap.

perks.name: Armed and Ready
perks.description: Start each run with one Uncommon-rarity weapon in addition to your defaults.

perks.name: Camp Fire
perks.description: One extra refugee joins your camp from the very first day.

perks.name: Scholar
perks.description: All unlocked blueprints are kept permanently between runs (never lost on death).

perks.name: Tough Base
perks.description: Your base starts each night with +50 extra max HP.

perks.name: Lucky Looter
perks.description: All loot runs yield 25% more resources.
